age_query.question: Show me datasets where the average participant age is greater than 20 years.

institution_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(d.institutions) AS inst WHERE inst ILIKE '%MIT%') GROUP BY d.id

institution_query.question: Show datasets from the Child Mind Institute.
institution_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(d.institutions) AS inst WHERE inst ILIKE '%Child Mind%') GROUP BY d.id

institution_query.question: Find datasets acquired at NYU.
institution_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(d.institutions) AS inst WHERE inst ILIKE '%NYU%') GROUP BY d.id

institution_query.question: Which datasets were collected at Princeton University?
institution_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(d.institutions) AS inst WHERE inst ILIKE '%Princeton%') GROUP BY d.id

institution_query.question: Find multi-site datasets collected at more than one institution.
institution_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE array_length(d.institutions, 1) > 1 GROUP BY d.id

institution_query.question: List datasets acquired at multiple scanning sites.
institution_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE array_length(d.institutions, 1) > 1 GROUP BY d.id

institution_query.question: Find datasets NOT collected at Stanford.
institution_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(d.institutions) AS inst WHERE inst ILIKE '%Stanford%') GROUP BY d.id

institution_query.question: Show me datasets from Harvard or Massachusetts General Hospital.
institution_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(d.institutions) AS inst WHERE inst ILIKE '%Harvard%' OR inst ILIKE '%Massachusetts General%' OR inst ILIKE '%MGH%') GROUP BY d.id

institution_query.question: Find datasets where no institution is recorded.
institution_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.institutions IS NULL OR array_length(d.institutions, 1) = 0 GROUP BY d.id

institution_query.question: Find fMRI datasets from the Max Planck Institute.
institution_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.datatype = 'functional_mri') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(d.institutions) AS inst WHERE inst ILIKE '%Max Planck%') GROUP BY d.id

clinical_design_query.question: Find datasets with both schizophrenia patients and healthy controls.
clinical_design_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p WHERE p.dataset_id = d.id AND p.diagnosis = 'schizophrenia') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p2 WHERE p2.dataset_id = d.id AND p2.diagnosis = 'healthy_control') GROUP BY d.id

clinical_design_query.question: Find datasets containing both Parkinson's disease patients and healthy controls.
clinical_design_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p WHERE p.dataset_id = d.id AND p.diagnosis = 'parkinsons_disease') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p2 WHERE p2.dataset_id = d.id AND p2.diagnosis = 'healthy_control') GROUP BY d.id

clinical_design_query.question: Find autism spectrum disorder datasets with matched healthy controls.
clinical_design_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p WHERE p.dataset_id = d.id AND p.diagnosis = 'autism_spectrum_disorder') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p2 WHERE p2.dataset_id = d.id AND p2.diagnosis = 'healthy_control') GROUP BY d.id

clinical_design_query.question: Which datasets include both ADHD and typically developing participants?
clinical_design_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p WHERE p.dataset_id = d.id AND p.diagnosis = 'adhd') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p2 WHERE p2.dataset_id = d.id AND p2.diagnosis = 'healthy_control') GROUP BY d.id

clinical_design_query.question: Find datasets that include both epilepsy patients and healthy controls.
clinical_design_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p WHERE p.dataset_id = d.id AND p.diagnosis = 'epilepsy_spectrum') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p2 WHERE p2.dataset_id = d.id AND p2.diagnosis = 'healthy_control') GROUP BY d.id

clinical_design_query.question: Show datasets that mix clinical and control participants.
clinical_design_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p WHERE p.dataset_id = d.id AND p.diagnosis IS NOT NULL AND p.diagnosis NOT IN ('healthy_control', 'healthy_volunteer')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p2 WHERE p2.dataset_id = d.id AND p2.diagnosis IN ('healthy_control', 'healthy_volunteer')) GROUP BY d.id

clinical_design_query.question: Show datasets where more than half the participants have a clinical diagnosis.
clinical_design_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bids_participants p WHERE p.dataset_id = d.id AND p.diagnosis IS NOT NULL AND p.diagnosis NOT IN ('healthy_control', 'healthy_volunteer'))::float / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bids_participants p WHERE p.dataset_id = d.id AND p.diagnosis IS NOT NULL), 0) > 0.5 GROUP BY d.id

clinical_design_query.question: Find fMRI datasets with both depression patients and healthy controls.
clinical_design_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.datatype = 'functional_mri') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p WHERE p.dataset_id = d.id AND p.diagnosis = 'major_depressive_disorder') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_participants p2 WHERE p2.dataset_id = d.id AND p2.diagnosis = 'healthy_control') GROUP BY d.id

clinical_design_query.question: List datasets with patients from at least two different diagnostic groups.
clinical_design_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.diagnosis) FROM bids_participants p WHERE p.dataset_id = d.id AND p.diagnosis IS NOT NULL AND p.diagnosis NOT IN ('healthy_control', 'healthy_volunteer')) >= 2 GROUP BY d.id

run_query.question: Find fMRI datasets with at least 2 runs.
run_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bo.run) FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.datatype = 'functional_mri' AND bo.run IS NOT NULL) >= 2 GROUP BY d.id

run_query.question: Show me datasets designed for test-retest reliability with multiple scanning runs.
run_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bo.run) FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.run IS NOT NULL) >= 2 GROUP BY d.id

run_query.question: Find datasets with multiple resting state runs.
run_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bo.run) FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.task IN ('resting_state', 'resting_state_eyes_open', 'resting_state_eyes_closed') AND bo.run IS NOT NULL) >= 2 GROUP BY d.id

run_query.question: List datasets with more than 3 functional MRI runs.
run_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bo.run) FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.datatype = 'functional_mri' AND bo.run IS NOT NULL) > 3 GROUP BY d.id

run_query.question: Show datasets with only a single run of functional MRI.
run_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.datatype = 'functional_mri') AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bo.run) FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.datatype = 'functional_mri' AND bo.run IS NOT NULL) <= 1 GROUP BY d.id

run_query.question: Find datasets where fMRI has been acquired with multiple runs per session.
run_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bo.run) FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.datatype = 'functional_mri' AND bo.run IS NOT NULL) >= 2 GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY subject_count DESC LIMIT 50

task_diversity_query.question: Find datasets with more than 5 distinct tasks.
task_diversity_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.task) > 5

task_diversity_query.question: Show me multi-task battery datasets with at least 8 different paradigms.
task_diversity_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.task) >= 8

task_diversity_query.question: List datasets that contain only a single task.
task_diversity_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.task) = 1

task_diversity_query.question: Find datasets with the most diverse task coverage.
task_diversity_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT o.task) DESC LIMIT 10

task_diversity_query.question: Show datasets with at least 3 different cognitive tasks.
task_diversity_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.task) >= 3

task_diversity_query.question: Find fMRI datasets with more than 4 distinct task conditions.
task_diversity_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.datatype = 'functional_mri') GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.task) > 4

per_subject_session_query.question: Find datasets where every participant has at least 3 longitudinal sessions.
per_subject_session_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT o2.subject, COUNT(DISTINCT o2.session) AS n_sess FROM bids_objects o2 WHERE o2.dataset_id = d.id AND o2.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o2.subject) per_sub WHERE per_sub.n_sess < 3) GROUP BY d.id

per_subject_session_query.question: Show datasets with consistent longitudinal coverage where each subject has been scanned at least twice.
per_subject_session_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT o2.subject, COUNT(DISTINCT o2.session) AS n_sess FROM bids_objects o2 WHERE o2.dataset_id = d.id AND o2.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o2.subject) per_sub WHERE per_sub.n_sess < 2) GROUP BY d.id

per_subject_session_query.question: List datasets where the average number of sessions per subject is at least 4.
per_subject_session_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (SELECT AVG(sess_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o2.session) AS sess_count FROM bids_objects o2 WHERE o2.dataset_id = d.id AND o2.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o2.subject) sub_sessions) >= 4 GROUP BY d.id

per_subject_session_query.question: Find datasets where every subject has at least 2 sessions.
per_subject_session_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT o2.subject, COUNT(DISTINCT o2.session) AS n_sess FROM bids_objects o2 WHERE o2.dataset_id = d.id AND o2.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o2.subject) per_sub WHERE per_sub.n_sess < 2) GROUP BY d.id

per_subject_session_query.question: Show me datasets where the average number of sessions per participant is at least 3.
per_subject_session_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (SELECT AVG(sess_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o2.session) AS sess_count FROM bids_objects o2 WHERE o2.dataset_id = d.id AND o2.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o2.subject) sub_sessions) >= 3 GROUP BY d.id

paper_reference_query.question: Find datasets that have at least one linked publication.
paper_reference_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.paper_references IS NOT NULL AND array_length(d.paper_references, 1) > 0 GROUP BY d.id

paper_reference_query.question: Show datasets without any paper references.
paper_reference_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (d.paper_references IS NULL OR array_length(d.paper_references, 1) = 0) AND d.readme_text IS NULL GROUP BY d.id

paper_reference_query.question: Find datasets with more than 2 linked papers.
paper_reference_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE array_length(d.paper_references, 1) > 2 GROUP BY d.id

paper_reference_query.question: List all datasets that have associated journal article references.
paper_reference_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.paper_references IS NOT NULL AND array_length(d.paper_references, 1) > 0 GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY d.name

paper_reference_query.question: Find datasets referencing a PubMed article.
paper_reference_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(d.paper_references) AS ref WHERE ref ILIKE '%pubmed%' OR ref ILIKE '%ncbi.nlm%') OR d.readme_text ILIKE '%pubmed%' OR d.readme_text ILIKE '%ncbi.nlm%') GROUP BY d.id

paper_reference_query.question: Find datasets that reference a paper with a doi.org link.
paper_reference_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(d.paper_references) AS ref WHERE ref ILIKE '%doi.org%') OR d.readme_text ILIKE '%doi.org%') GROUP BY d.id

bids_provenance_query.question: Show me only raw (unprocessed) datasets.
bids_provenance_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.dataset_type = 'raw' GROUP BY d.id

bids_provenance_query.question: Find derivative datasets containing preprocessed data.
bids_provenance_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.dataset_type = 'derivative' GROUP BY d.id

bids_provenance_query.question: List datasets using BIDS version 1.7 or later.
bids_provenance_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.bids_version >= '1.7.0' GROUP BY d.id

bids_provenance_query.question: Find datasets that use BIDS version 1.0.
bids_provenance_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.bids_version ILIKE '1.0%' GROUP BY d.id

bids_provenance_query.question: Find datasets that have passed BIDS validation.
bids_provenance_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.validation_status = 'valid' GROUP BY d.id

bids_provenance_query.question: Show me raw fMRI datasets that have a DOI.
bids_provenance_query.sql: SELECT {{COLS}} FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.dataset_type = 'raw' AND d.doi IS NOT NULL AND d.doi != '' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.datatype = 'functional_mri') GROUP BY d.id
